name: Dan Lipinski [Take the Survey]
subject: which one do you pick?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for CongressContributions or gifts to Dan Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible
body:
http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com/ [http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com/]SUPPORTER SURVEY: Should Congress act now to defend the Affordable Care Act from elimination?
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-aca-up?refcode=DL_EM_SV_90DO_181217_1_1_yes&amount=10&recurring=auto&refcode2=d8970ac1-9f12-e911-9f2a-281878391efb] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-aca-up?refcode=DL_EM_SV_90DO_181217_1_1_no&amount=10&recurring=auto&refcode2=d8970ac1-9f12-e911-9f2a-281878391efb]
Peter,
A federal judge in Texas has ruled that the Affordable Care Act cannot stand, throwing healthcare coverage for over 20 million Americans into jeopardy.
Democrats are already appealing the ruling, but it’s clear that these attempts to undermine affordable health care will never stop.
That’s why Dan has co-sponsored critical legislation to enable the House to defend the ACA in court.
But right now, we need to hear YOUR opinion on this incredibly consequential move:
SUPPORTER SURVEY: Should Congress act now to defend the Affordable Care Act from elimination?
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-aca-up?refcode=DL_EM_SV_90DO_181217_1_1_yes&amount=10&recurring=auto&refcode2=d8970ac1-9f12-e911-9f2a-281878391efb] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-aca-up?refcode=DL_EM_SV_90DO_181217_1_1_no&amount=10&recurring=auto&refcode2=d8970ac1-9f12-e911-9f2a-281878391efb]

name: Team Stanton
subject: climate science
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
The science on climate change is definitive - it is happening, and we are running out of time to stop the worst impacts.

It is time for Congress to pull its head out of the sand and take action.

Greg has been a climate champion for years. He helped turn Phoenix into one of the most sustainable cities in America while growing the economy and improving quality of life.

**We need to make sure Greg 's colleagues in Congress have the same priorities. **

**[Will you add your name to our petition to demand Congress take action on climate change?](https://act.myngp.com/el/mqTg2MnQL_JDmn3ZDk_C3xiAKxr45HNC33vG2DX1Nrw=/HOHr7mdB-HtpXhImMrCvLWg2kJJgTFWxURyRet0zopg=)**

Thank you!

Team Stanton

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/mqTg2MnQL_JDmn3ZDk_C3xiAKxr45HNC33vG2DX1Nrw=/HOHr7mdB-HtpXhImMrCvLWg2kJJgTFWxURyRet0zopg=)

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

Friend, for the past two weeks we’ve seen just how low the Democrats will sink in order to obstruct our agenda and everything we’ve accomplished since 2016.

Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer shut down YOUR government by choosing illegal immigrants over hard-working American patriots like YOU. NO MORE!

The only reason Democrats shut down the government is because they know they can’t win in 2020. They don’t care about your safety, they only care about Presidential Harassment!

We showed them in 2016, now let’s show them again that the silent majority is back and will NEVER be forgotten again.

We’re going to remind each and every Democrat that the American people voted for border security, the rule of law and to BUILD THE WALL!

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: We're at a pivotal moment. That's why we need Jumaane Williams.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Jumaane has been advocating for New Yorkers for more than two decades, and I'm proud to endorse his run for New York City Public Advocate.

This is a pivotal point in history, Peter -
Corruption has infected our state and federal government. We're almost out of time to curb climate change. And from Amazon giveaways to the Trump tax scheme, our leaders just keep transferring wealth from working people to big corporations and the super-rich.
**New York could be a progressive beacon for the rest of the country, leading the way to get our government back to work for the people. But we 'll need a proven advocate to cut through the cronyism and lead that charge. Jumaane Williams is that leader.**
**[Jumaane has been advocating for New Yorkers for more than two decades, and I 'm proud to endorse his run for New York City Public Advocate. Will you join me to support Jumaane?](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780956/6e822e2f/1d0fc540/4173b766/3877790196/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jw_jan19?refcode=em20190107_zephyr_zlist")**
In three terms on the New York City Council, Jumaane has stood shoulder to shoulder with New Yorkers fighting for justice and equity for all - and he's delivered results in some of the toughest issues facing the city, from gun violence to skyrocketing housing costs.
**In short, he 's been a fierce and effective advocate for the people - and that terrifies the corporate and real estate interests that are pouring money into this race. That's why I felt it was so important that I reach out to you.**
**[Peter , with these powerful ](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780956/6e822e2f/1d0fc540/4173b766/3877790196/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jw_jan19?refcode=em20190107_zephyr_zlist")****[interests](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780956/6e822e2f/1d0fc540/4173b766/3877790196/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jw_jan19?refcode=em20190107_zephyr_zlist")****[lined up against him, Jumaane 's path won't be easy. But with your help, we can build this movement $10 or $20 at a time - and put a champion for the people in the Public Advocate's office.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780956/6e822e2f/1d0fc540/4173b766/3877790196/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jw_jan19?refcode=em20190107_zephyr_zlist")**
Onward,
\-- Zephyr
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780956/6e822e2f/1d0fc540/4173b766/3877790196/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jw_jan19?refcode=em20190107_zephyr_zlist")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---
1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780956/6e822e2f/1d0fc540/4173b767/3877790196/VEsA/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780956/6e822e2f/1d0fc540/4173b768/3877790196/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

body:
[ ](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSHOGao9s2cN5Lpg1UVge77rkWwwNcxZ2mVB26YZGOSbY_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M-2F1NmSyt20M9Jy1g4AzhtbbF6B24WGDeJplWGrfgTU-2BP6ruoh5rDBm5l7fsNbx2EsB-2F8KqSs7OwCDsZjbxMZTjeX5oZTCNMjbwlsDqdE0eVieULppOhy4J-2BLBOjolIeJOS9QUS9aj-2FQY98MfF7cq1DnNok4-2FmroGS-2Bg2-2B48lghs8ETDeedYNoAQvD9EMv7u19cViJ3AoPmo6XwMCI4uD8dhgNvY1f20sfqv8SvWZ4SiYI8s0cynZJCY-2BMXS2635h6CmVru38jL0JWefUXKOjd6Q-3D-3D) Derek,
It may be a new year, but we still have the same goal: **getting Republicans elected!** Gov. Sununu is consistently one of the most popular governors in the country and we are looking forward to many more years under his successful leadership. **When you activate or renew your 2019 membership** today, you're giving the NHGOP and the Governor an early boost to help us build our 2020 victory operation. We have a ton of work to do and your immediate membership contribution of $15, $25, $35, or even $55 right now jump starts our path to victory. [A donation of $35 or more will give you instant access to your 2019 membership card!](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSHOGao9s2cN5Lpg1UVge77rkWwwNcxZ2mVB26YZGOSbY_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M-2F1NmSyt20M9Jy1g4AzhtbbF6B24WGDeJplWGrfgTU-2BP6ruoh5rDBm5l7fsNbx2EsB-2F8KqSs7OwCDsZjbxMZTjR2OYDGr8pDyI3P1licTVe9E3NmvgRWws3GcdE-2FXKxKTQj8qgQKgpkTD13mxKZFTYeN2rXta11pc-2BuTuUK-2FxNKtgMM-2BkYzU23UY0ef7A9h-2BziiY7zzI0giKjJPaxt7pO-2BVRcFfyqmzszOcQlM4A-2BtuB8cJ3MI-2FkxFInc9ZJHN-2BnWmYqvtC0a56olx2KjPRnvTQ-3D-3D) New Hampshire Republicans have a lot to focus on for the 2020 elections. We have a U.S. Senate race against Jeanne Shaheen, two competitive U.S. Congressional races, a fight for control of the House, Senate, and Executive Council and we'll need to keep Governor Sununu in the Corner Office so New Hampshire may continue to prosper. Also, **we are going to deliver the Granite State for our President, Donald Trump.** Your membership in the NH Republican Party this year is imperative. [Activate or renew your 2019 digital membership now with a donation of at least $35 or more!](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSHOGao9s2cN5Lpg1UVge77rkWwwNcxZ2mVB26YZGOSbY_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M-2F1NmSyt20M9Jy1g4AzhtbbF6B24WGDeJplWGrfgTU-2BP6ruoh5rDBm5l7fsNbx2EsB-2F8KqSs7OwCDsZjbxMZTjbS-2BzYWXSGICTQzDFeqcl5tFRcAQGY0FE29kB7PwQmaqLum9E-2FkXRh-2BnKsn0J0ilIUEbhdQJcsyZ-2FxwJX3dofRzIA4TvIoWCzO4tbBuuTgqtpCaYe-2F8c7YulwBVkdHDExuZeM2SBE0-2FuR-2B7rev-2FoVrbMaJmpFjFar7DM1n0ZNr8le473PwGnfQmDBWPSwJ-2Blyg-3D-3D) If you have already claimed your 2019 membership, thank you for your consistent support! clean_body: Derek, It may be a new year, but we still have the same goal: getting Republicans elected! Gov. Sununu is consistently one of the most popular governors in the country and we are looking forward to many more years under his successful leadership. When you activate or renew your 2019 membership today, you're giving the NHGOP and the Governor an early boost to help us build our 2020 victory operation. We have a ton of work to do and your immediate membership contribution of $15, $25, $35, or even $55 right now jump starts our path to victory. New Hampshire Republicans have a lot to focus on for the 2020 elections. We have a U.S. Senate race against Jeanne Shaheen, two competitive U.S. Congressional races, a fight for control of the House, Senate, and Executive Council and we'll need to keep Governor Sununu in the Corner Office so New Hampshire may continue to prosper. Also, we are going to deliver the Granite State for our President, Donald Trump. Your membership in the NH Republican Party this year is imperative. If you have already claimed your 2019 membership, thank you for your consistent support! Sincerely, Wayne MacDonald NHGOP Chairman | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: Team O'Halleran
subject: it's hit us hardest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
That's right, team. Arizona is one of the top ten states most hurt by the shutdown and it affects some of our most critical institutions -- from our parks department which operates the
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633cb5/1a8421e1/19be4a153/407ad8fd/3489223083/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq12019?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
**Arizona ranks #10 among states most affected by government shutdown** -_KOLD News 13_ [**Help Arizona and support a common-sense resolution to the shutdown. Click here.**](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633cb5/1a8421e1/19be4a153/407ad8e0/3489223083/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MzA3In0=/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/end-the-shutdown?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=85307") That's right, team. Arizona is one of the top ten states most hurt by the shutdown and it affects some of our most critical institutions -- from our parks department which operates the Grand Canyon National Park to the TSA personnel at Phoenix Sky Harbor. **Let 's be clear, this shutdown not only hurts our economy here in Arizona, but also makes us less safe.** Tom believes in finding a common-sense solution to this shutdown. As a former police officer, he understands the importance of securing our border in a responsible, and effective manner -- not with a wall. **But he also knows that our safety and economic security is better served by a fully functional and funded government.** That's why Tom is seeking a common-sense end to this shutdown by fully funding the government, and then addressing immigration reform and border security on a separate basis to provide Arizonan families stability and security. **But the problem solvers in Congress, like Tom, can 't do this alone. [Click here to demand a quick, responsible end to this shutdown.](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633cb5/1a8421e1/19be4a153/407ad8e0/3489223083/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MzA3In0=/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/end-the-shutdown?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=85307")** | ****[END THE SHUTDOWN](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633cb5/1a8421e1/19be4a153/407ad8e0/3489223083/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MzA3In0=/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/end-the-shutdown?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=85307")****
---
Thank you,

Team O'Halleran

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq12019?refcode=em_pet_2019.01.07_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq12019?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633cb5/1a8421e1/19be4a153/407ad8d7/3489223083/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633cb5/1a8421e1/19be4a153/407ad8d8/3489223083/VEsP/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Governor=20Scott?=
subject: REMINDER: Explore Vermont Inaugural Gala
body:
Please join us! |
---
| | **There's still time to get your tickets!**
---
| |
---
|
---
| **Explore Vermont Gala begins at 7:30 p.m.**
Doors close at 9:00 p.m.
Gala concludes at 11:00 p.m.

**General admission tickets can be purchased online at[www.philscott.org](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=1143a01ca2&e=19cebfe173)**
VISA, MasterCard, Discover, American Express are accepted

**Or by check
Payable to: Barre Opera House
P.O. Box 583
Barre, VT 05641**
**General admission $50.00
_Proceeds will go to Vermont children's programs_**

* * *

**EXPLORE VERMONT GALA SPONSORSHIPS
Governor’s sponsorship reception begins at 6:30 p.m.**

**Platinum $5,000**
Recognition on Gala banner and in program
Two Reception and eight Gala tickets - reserved table
Eight donated Gala tickets to youth mentors and military personnel

**Gold $2,500**
Recognition on Gala banner and in program
Two Reception and four Gala tickets - open seating
Four donated Gala tickets to youth mentors and military personnel

**Silver $1,000**
Recognition in program
Two Reception and two Gala tickets - open seating
Two donated Gala tickets to youth mentors and military personnel

**Please make Sponsorship checks payable to: **
Vermonters United to Help, PO Box 52, Montpelier, VT 05601

**Questions? E-mail[ info@philscott.org](mailto:info@philscott.org)**
---
| | | **Lodging Accommodations**
A block of rooms has been reserved for Saturday, January 12, 2019. The special room rate will be available until January 7th or until the group block is sold-out, whichever comes first.

To reserve your room, click [here](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=820c5924b2&e=19cebfe173).
---
| Phil Scott for Vermont, Glen Wright, Treasurer,
P.O. Box 988, Montpelier, VT, 05602

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173&c=7e00573858)
---

name: Team Inslee
subject: Our climate action vision statement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Thanks for joining us on this -- now's your chance to learn a bit more.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7aacb/2f5ea88d/79d70c7a/2cbdc69c/2019972231/VEsH/ "https://www.theatlantic.com/politics/archive/2019/01/washington-governor-jay-inslee-running-president/579217/") Friend, Jay's been talking about the critical work of combating climate change for a long time -- for decades. These days, it feels like we're finally seeing more and more people awaken to the urgent danger that it poses. It's heartening. And it's clear that now more than ever there is an appetite for leaders who have the credibility and a long track record of fighting this critical threat. That's why Jay's insisting we make fighting climate change the focus of the 2020 elections. **He talked to _The Atlantic_ about our plans, and now we want you to read all about it.** [**Read the _Atlantic_ article right now!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7aacb/2f5ea88d/79d70c7a/2cbdc69c/2019972231/VEsE/ "https://www.theatlantic.com/politics/archive/2019/01/washington-governor-jay-inslee-running-president/579217/") Look, we have two existential threats right now: One is to our natural systems, and one is to our economic systems. If we embrace a clean-energy future, we can beat back both threats at once, saving our planet and creating millions of jobs in the clean-energy economy. We know you're with Jay in making sure we stand together in moving our country towards a completely fossil-fuel-free future. We know you're ready to tell Donald Trump and his climate-denying cronies that we will not be intimidated by them. [**Check out the _Atlantic_ article all about Jay's plans for a clean energy future.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7aacb/2f5ea88d/79d70c7a/2cbdc69c/2019972231/VEsF/ "https://www.theatlantic.com/politics/archive/2019/01/washington-governor-jay-inslee-running-president/579217/") Thank you for making an America like this -- an America that fights climate change -- possible. Let's get to work, Team Inslee | [READ THE ARTICLE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7aacb/2f5ea88d/79d70c7a/2cbdc69c/2019972231/VEsC/ "https://www.theatlantic.com/politics/archive/2019/01/washington-governor-jay-inslee-running-president/579217/")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7aacb/2f5ea88d/79d70c7a/2cbdc693/2019972231/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
---

These days, it feels like we're finally seeing more and more people awaken to the urgent danger that it poses. It's heartening. And it's clear that now more than ever there is an appetite for leaders who have the credibility and a long track record of fighting this critical threat. That's why Jay's insisting we make fighting climate change the focus of the 2020 elections. He talked to The Atlantic about our plans, and now we want you to read all about it. "" Look, we have two existential threats right now: One is to our natural systems, and one is to our economic systems. If we embrace a clean-energy future, we can beat back both threats at once, saving our planet and creating millions of jobs in the clean-energy economy. We know you're with Jay in making sure we stand together in moving our country towards a completely fossil-fuel-free future. We know you're ready to tell Donald Trump and his climate-denying cronies that we will not be intimidated by them. "" Thank you for making an America like this -- an America that fights climate change -- possible. Let's get to work, Team Inslee | ""
